def send_notifications(users: list):
    for user in users:
        send_email(user.email)


def log_all_events(events: list):
    for e in events:
        logger.info(f"Event: {e}")


def update_records(records: list):
    for r in records:
        db.save(r)


def batch_delete(items: list):
    for item in items:
        cache.delete(item.key)
